html:
Exclusive to:

The Cork Bowl Canoe is a craftable Boat Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab. It requires 4 Cork and 1 Rope to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Canoes have a sail slot for Sails or a Trawl Net, and a light slot for a Boat Lantern or Boat Torch.

Like a Surfboard, Cork Bowl Canoes can be retrieved by the player and transported in their Inventory.

DSTDSRoGSWHam

Cork Bowl Canoe
"Good for portage and tough as porridge."
×4 ×1

80 (180 seconds)
Does not stack

"corkboat"
“An accident waiting to happen.”
–Wilson
“It’d be better if I could light it on fire.”
–Willow
“Is weakling.”
–Wolfgang
“I only hope when it sinks, the end will be quick.”
–Wendy
“IT MOCKS ME”
–WX-78
“I suppose it’s safe for a quick trip up the river.”
–Wickerbottom
“Only good for a short trip.”
–Woodie
“Looks barely seaworthy.”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically, it works. Though I won't predict for how long.”
–Wagstaff
“'Tis more like a stage prop than a viking vessel.”
–Wigfrid
“I don’t know. Looks kinda flimsy.”
–Webber
“I've definitely seen better boats.”
–Walani
“A shaky sea vessel.”
–Warly
“It be a poorly ship.”
–Woodlegs
“FRAILTY, THY NAME IS'T CORK BOWL CANOE!”
–Wilba
“Puny Floater”
–Wormwood
“About as stable as a cork balloon.”
–Wheeler
The Cork Bowl Canoe is a craftable Boat Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab. It requires 4 Cork and 1 Rope to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Canoes have a sail slot for Sails or a Trawl Net, and a light slot for a Boat Lantern or Boat Torch.
Like a Surfboard, Cork Bowl Canoes can be retrieved by the player and transported in their Inventory.

The '''Cork Bowl Canoe''' is a craftable [[Boats|Boat]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Nautical Tab]]. It requires 4 [[Cork]] and 1 [[Rope]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. Canoes have a sail slot for [[Sail|Sails]] or a [[Trawl Net]], and a light slot for a [[Boat Lantern]] or [[Boat Torch]].

Like a [[Surfboard]], Cork Bowl Canoes can be retrieved by the player and transported in their [[Inventory]].
{{Craftable Items}}
